Figure 2 – Classes of variants among singletons detected at the M2 generation. (a) 318 Mutation type of observed singletons after quality control (genotype quality ≥ 20, read depth < 80). The vast 319 majority (94.2%) of singletons were G:C-to-A:T transitions, as expected after mutagenesis by NaN3. (b) Gene 320 features of G:C-to-A:T singletons. The majority (62.7%) of G:C-to-A:T singletons were in intergenic regions; 321 CDS: coding sequence; UTR: untranslated region (3’ or 5’). 322
